meta.title: PAS OptICS Keynote: Making Sense Of ICS Security Products
meta.description:
Dale Peterson's keynote from the PAS event. It's a blunt, direct analysis of the ICS security product market in late 2020. Dale reviews:
- endpoint protection solutions for ICS
- remote access
- perimeter security
- detection solutions (and some asset inventory)
